name: Østerås Bygg
message: Østerås Bygg (founded in 1995) - the company produces and sets climatic walls, facades, internal walls, installation of doors, windows, floors and ceilings, moldings and parquet. Østerås Bygg corporate office is located in 13 Hovfaret, Oslo, Oslo, 0275, Norway. The total amount of data leakage is 125.50 GB
